label: General Writing Exam Rubric (B2 & C1)
zero_rules: Plagiarism or copying from another source
Off-topic: writing about a different topic than assigned

grammar.name: Grammar
grammar.description: Tenses, subject/verb agreement, negatives, and structures seen in class.

bands.description: 0-3 grammar errors total. Tense agreement is consistent. Uses 4+ grammar structures from the class list.
4-5 grammar errors. Tense agreement mostly correct. Uses 3 grammar structures from the class list.
6-9 grammar errors, mostly complex ones (tense agreement issues, subject-verb agreement, article use). Uses 2 grammar structures from the class list.
10-15 grammar errors, including some basic ones (wrong singular/plural, missing articles on most nouns, basic tense errors). Uses 1 grammar structure from the class list.
15+ grammar errors, many of them basic. No grammar structures from the class list used. Tense agreement is absent or inconsistent throughout.

vocabulary.name: Vocabulary
vocabulary.description: Correct words and vocabulary taught in class.

bands.description: 10+ class-vocabulary words used correctly.
7-9 class-vocabulary words used correctly.
5-6 class-vocabulary words used correctly.
3-4 class-vocabulary words used correctly.
0-2 class-vocabulary words used, OR class-vocabulary words used incorrectly.
0-3 spelling errors.
4-5 spelling errors.
6-8 spelling errors.
9-10 spelling errors.
11+ spelling errors.

mechanics.name: Mechanics & Punctuation
mechanics.description: Correct use of commas, periods, capitalization, apostrophes, and sentence boundaries.

bands.description: 0-3 punctuation/capitalization errors total. Small slips like a missing comma, missing apostrophe, missed capital, or one run-on sentence.
4-5 punctuation/capitalization errors. Occasional slips, meaning remains clear.
6-10 punctuation/capitalization errors. Noticeable but communication is still clear.
11-20 punctuation/capitalization errors.
20+ punctuation/capitalization errors AND the text is difficult to follow because of them.

fluency.name: Fluency
fluency.description: Organization and logical flow of ideas.

bands.description: Well-organized. Clear logical flow between ideas and paragraphs. Easy to follow.
Organization is mostly clear. Minor choppy transitions between ideas.
Some organizational issues. Structure is not always easy to follow. Ideas are present but not always connected.
Choppy structure. Ideas organized inadequately. Purpose sometimes unclear. Repetitive.
Text is not structured. Ideas disconnected. Logic unclear.

layout.name: Layout & Follow Specs
layout.description: Structure, paragraphs, length, and cohesive devices (transition words, pronouns, synonyms).

bands.description: Length within target range (10-13 words under OR 10-15 words over). Clear paragraph structure. 6+ varied transition words used.
Length slightly off target (14-15 words under OR 16-20 words over). Good structure. 5 transition words used.
Length off target (16-17 words under OR 21-25 words over). Some structural inconsistencies. 4 transition words, somewhat repetitive.
Length clearly off target (18-19 words under OR 26-30 words over). Weak structure. 2-3 transition words.
Length severely off target (20+ words under OR 31+ words over). Structure missing or incoherent. Zero transition words.

content.name: Content & Information
content.description: Completeness and relevance of ideas and supporting information.

bands.description: Considerable variety of ideas. All content points addressed and elaborated. Directly connected to the topic.
Several valid ideas. Most content points addressed. Relevant to the assigned topic.
Some valid ideas. Partial elaboration. Main ideas present but choppy.
Limited variety of ideas. Most content points missing or underdeveloped.
Topic insufficiently addressed. No elaboration. Content barely relates to the assigned topic.
